description_long: This is a vintage-style chest of drawers with a distressed blue finish and visible patches of rust-colored wear, giving it an aged, weathered appearance. The chest features three large, curved-front drawers, each equipped with a single circular ring handle in the center. The top surface is slightly beveled with rounded corners, and the legs are short and tapered, adding to its classic silhouette. The sides and back are plain, with the same distressed blue paint and rust-like markings throughout. The handles and drawer outlines are subtly highlighted, suggesting a sturdy wooden construction beneath the painted exterior. This piece would likely be found in an urban alley, garage, or as discarded furniture on a sidewalk.
description: A distressed blue chest of drawers with three curved drawers and ring handles, featuring heavy weathering and rust-like patches. Its vintage look and worn paint suggest it has been exposed to the elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing three curved drawers with central ring handles and prominent rust patches.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the beveled top and distressed blue finish with rust spots, no handles visible.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, flat back with extensive weathering and no functional features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the worn paint and rust, with drawer sides and handles barely visible.
